subcategory: Landing page hero with globe illustration
use_cases: Landing page hero for performance-focused SaaS products
Feature showcase section for static site builders
Marketing page headers highlighting website speed metrics
Product landing pages emphasizing lightweight technical benefits
ai_summary: A hero section component featuring a decorative SVG globe illustration with ambient glow effects. Designed with glassmorphism styling and dual light/dark mode support, it showcases performance messaging with a prominent headline and supporting description. Optimized for landing pages in tech and SaaS industries with responsive desktop and mobile layouts.
